GeneDef.label: marked-virus resistance
GeneDef.description: Unusual immune markers make this person more resistant to the Marked Virus and other blood-borne infections.

GeneDef.label: marked aggression marker
GeneDef.description: A dangerous neurological expression pattern seen in late-stage Marked Virus mutations. It increases movement and melee pressure at the cost of social stability.

GeneDef.label: hyper-aggressive
GeneDef.description: The Marked Virus amplifies aggression centers in the host's brain, driving them into a permanent state of violent fury. Melee strikes hit harder, but rational social behavior deteriorates.

GeneDef.label: longjump legs
GeneDef.description: Powerful mutated leg muscles allow the host to jump great distances.

GeneDef.label: unstoppable
GeneDef.description: The Marked Virus rewires pain receptors and reinforces muscle tissue, allowing the host to shrug off wounds that would fell a normal person and keep moving relentlessly forward.
